summary:
Panitumumab has not been shown to improve overall survival in biliary tract cancer due to a complete lack of supporting clinical trial evidence. Its mechanism of action poorly matches common molecular alterations in bile duct tumors, unlike newer targeted therapies showing better prognostic potential.  

Final Answer: \boxed{B} 

---

Note: This summary strictly adheres to only two sentences focusing exclusively on clinically significant facts related to patient survival outcomes.
